1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones (gjentaksintervall=200) within Drammen extent

3.description: get quick-clay mapping areas (kartleggingsomrade) within Drammen extent

4.description: get buildings in Drammen municipality with geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect the 200-year flood zones

6.description: compute distance from each flooded building to nearest quick-clay zone

7.description: collapse to one row per building with min distance

8.description: sort by distance ascending and building id as tie-breaker

args.sql:
SELECT objid, flomsoneid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200
  AND ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'));

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, flomsoneid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200
  AND ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'));

3.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood polygons

6.description: find nearest quick-clay zone for each building and compute distance

7.description: sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay ascending

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningid, bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

To fix: re-query the larger step with a spatial bounding-box filter — compute the bbox of the smaller result set and add ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(minx, miny, maxx, maxy, srid)) to that step's WHERE clause, then retry this spatial tool."}

1.description: get all buildings in Drammen municipality (filter by kommunenavn)

3.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood polygons

5.description: compute distance from each flooded building to nearest quick-clay polygon

6.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance
